criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower, App Annie

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Presence and effectiveness of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and music discovery tools.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, tech reviews, user feedback

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: The total number of songs and albums available in the app's library.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert analyses

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of premium subscriptions and the value for money offered.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms such as iOS, Android, web, and desktop.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: Social Features
criteria.description: Integration of social features like sharing playlists, following artists, and community engagement.

criteria.name: Offline Mode
criteria.description: Availability and quality of offline mode for downloading and listening to music without an internet connection.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store listings, official app blogs
